title: HyphaPiracea
description: Channel the Garden's Rot; Steal the Works of the Worlds; Bridge the Gap
body:
_You Wouldn't Steal a Nether Fortress..._

# HyphaPiracea

_HyphaPiracea_ is a mod about using Rotten Fungal Magitech to steal structures from Beyond the Worlds' Edge, and then conveniently place them into your world.

**Note: This mod is early in development, features are not finalised.**

## Hyphal Circuits

Using _Hyphaline_, you can create Electrical _Hyphal Circuits_.

Connect components with _Hyphaline_, _Hyphal Nodes_, or just face-to-face.

Create branches by Etching Hyphal Nodes with an Axe.

Enjoy the Wonders of _Voltage_, _Amperage_, and actually having to build your Circuit _like a Circuit_!

## The Magnetic Leyfield

When _Current_ flows through a _Hyphaline_, it will generate a _Magnetic Leyfield_ in the World.

_Charged Objects_ that pass through the field will be disrupted, and have their trajectories altered.

When creating a ring of Hyphaline, the current will typically be significantly stronger inside the ring than outside.

Ponder the Marvels of _Electromagnetism_!

## The Piraceatic Leukbox

The _Piraceatic Leukbox_ is a device capable of 'installing' Structures into the world via _Keyed Discs_.

To Operate, insert the Disc into the Leukbox and provide it with power via a _Hyphal Circuit_.
The Leukbox will then begin to generate a structure.

However, the Leukbox can only place blocks in the presence of a sufficiently strong _Leyfield_, and can only place blocks where the direction of their field opposes its own.

_Both_ the Leukbox and target position must have a Field Strength above the Disc's threshold, and the field must flow in _Different Directions_ at both points.

**Note: Keyed Discs are not yet obtainable in Survival**
